allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add smart image stitching, reset button, temp cleanup, fix opacity

- Smart image stitching with layout-based rotation patterns
  - Horizontal: 2→[VV], 3→[VHV], 4→[2x2], 5→[3V+2H]
  - Vertical: 2→[HH], 3→[HHH], 4→[2x2], 5→[3H+2V]
- Auto scale and center-crop to target resolution \(default 5120x1440\)
- Add reset to defaults button
- Fix window opacity not applying on restart \(deferred to first frame\)
- Clean up temp files on startup
- Update README.md and AGENTS.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
